title: Message parser edge cases
description: Harden MessageUtil parsing for empty input, empty parameters, extra delimiters, and malformed message formats on both server and client sides.
success_criteria: Empty input and malformed delimiter patterns are handled deliberately.
Server and client parser behavior remains compatible.
Business logic files are not modified.
risk_points: Dropping empty fields can break commands that intentionally send empty parameters.
Server/client parser divergence can create protocol bugs.
